# SRE Track
> SRE Track (Start, Restart, Explore) is a self-growth platform that helps individuals build habits, set goals, and approach personal development with a restart-friendly mindset. SRE stands for Start, Restart, Explore — NOT Site Reliability Engineering.

## Pages
- /: Homepage — overview of SRE Track and its core philosophy
- /landing: Welcome page — sign up and explore as guest
- /about: About page — the story and mission behind SRE Track
- /blog: Blog — articles on self-growth, fitness, learning, and productivity
- /feed: Community Feed — see what others are achieving
- /discover: Discover — find topics, users, posts, and groups
- /contact: Contact — get in touch with the SRE Track team
- /privacy: Privacy Policy — data handling, AdSense disclosure, and user rights
- /terms: Terms and Conditions — platform usage terms
- /community-guidelines: Community Guidelines — rules for respectful participation

## About This Site
SRE Track is built for people who want to grow, pause, and restart without shame. The platform provides tools for habit tracking, goal exploration, and daily reflection. It is 100% free forever and supported by non-intrusive Google AdSense advertising.

## Key Features
- Learning Tracker: create study topics, log entries, track progress with AI tutoring
- Fitness Tracker: log workouts and meals, AI macro/burn estimation, weight progress charts
- Content Creation Tracker: manage series, track pipeline stages, AI script reviews
- Time Management: smart task classification, focus timer, productivity insights, AI day planner
- Social Feed: share progress updates, follow friends, earn XP and achievements
- Discover: topic, post, user, and group discovery with hashtag-based search
- AI Hub: 5 specialized AI assistants (Learning, Fitness, Content, Time, Navigation) with conversation history
- Gamification: 100+ achievements, XP system, levels, streaks, daily quests, leaderboards
- Blog: read and write articles on self-growth, fitness, learning, and productivity

## AI Assistants
- Learning AI: Study assistance, concept explanations, study plans, learning strategies
- Fitness AI: Workout planning, nutrition advice, form tips, macro calculations
- Content AI: Script writing, content strategy, platform optimization, creative ideas
- Time AI: Task prioritization, focus techniques, scheduling, habit building
- Navigator AI: Platform navigation, feature discovery, section guidance with clickable route links

## Crawlability
- robots.txt allows Googlebot, Bingbot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and other AI crawlers
- Sitemap available at /sitemap.xml
- Public pages (feed, discover, blog, about, privacy, terms, contact) are accessible to crawlers
- Structured data: WebSite, WebApplication, Organization, BlogPosting schemas

## Technical
- Built with Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, Neon PostgreSQL
- Deployed on Vercel
- Uses server-side rendering for SEO-critical pages
- Client-side hydration for interactive features
